title: Freshly Pickled Malaysian Water Chestnut Skewers
description: A citrusy and refreshing Malaysian dish featuring water chestnut, perfect for a date night, with a yuzu-cure and vegan-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Soak the bamboo skewers in water for 30 minutes to prevent burning.
In a large bowl, whisk together yuzu juice, rice vinegar, sugar, and salt to make the pickling liquid.
Peel and slice the water chestnuts into 1/2 inch thick rounds.
Add the sliced water chestnuts to the pickling liquid and let it sit for at least 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium heat.
Thread 2-3 pickled water chestnut slices onto each bamboo skewer.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes on each side, until they have a nice char.
Garnish with chopped fresh mint leaves and sesame seeds.
